prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `1190bc91`.
codex_response:
Implemented the `1190bc91` ARC2 package in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1190bc91/__init__.py), [helpers.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1190bc91/helpers.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1190bc91/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1190bc91/generator.py). The rule is: the long multicolor line seeds diagonal rays, with the first two cells drawing full Xs and later cells only continuing away from the line start; each 2-cell bar then fills the matching wedge region beside that structure.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as a starting point and kept it because it matched the official examples. `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry for `1190bc91`, so no `notes.md` was needed. The generator constructs the latent line and wedge bars directly, then derives the output from the same geometry; no new shared primitive was added.
